revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月初八]][[zh:四月初八]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 8|qq=April 8}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}}. == Events == * {{ill|Kaō (era)|en|Kaō (era)|qid=Q1150842|lt=Kaō|1=Kaō (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1169|en|1169|qid=Q19680|lt=1169|1=1169}} {{ill|May 6|en|May 6|qid=Q2552|lt=May 6|1=May 6}}) – {{ill|Emperor Takakura|en|Emperor Takakura|qid=Q357261|lt=Emperor Takakura|1=Emperor Takakura}} acceded; for his accession the era name was changed from {{ill|Nin'an|ja|仁安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nin'an|1=Nin'an|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q18925702}} to {{ill|Kaō (era)|en|Kaō (era)|qid=Q1150842|lt=Kaō|1=Kaō (era)}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|qid=Q1194415|lt=Bunchi|1=Bunji (era)}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1186|en|1186|qid=Q19730|lt=1186|1=1186}} {{ill|April 28|en|April 28|qid=Q2534|lt=April 28|1=April 28}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|en|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|qid=Q310445|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitsune|1=Minamoto no Yoshitsune}}’s beloved mistress, {{ill|Shizuka Gozen|en|Shizuka Gozen|qid=Q3088217|lt=Shizuka Gozen|1=Shizuka Gozen}}, who had been captured and sent to Kamakura, performed the “賤や賤” dance in front of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|qid=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo|1=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} and {{ill|Hōjō Masako|en|Hōjō Masako|qid=Q463961|lt=Hojo Masako|1=Hōjō Masako}}, expressing her love for Yoshitsune. * {{ill|Chōroku|en|Chōroku|qid=Q1193524|lt=Chōroku|1=Chōroku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1457|en|1457|qid=Q6518|lt=1457|1=1457}} {{ill|May 1|en|May 1|qid=Q2544|lt=May 1|1=May 1}}) – {{ill|Ōta Dōkan|en|Ōta Dōkan|qid=Q386144|lt=Ota Dokan|1=Ōta Dōkan}} built {{ill|Edo Castle|en|Edo Castle|qid=Q865913|lt=Edo Castle|1=Edo Castle}} in Sakurada, Ebara District of {{ill|Musashi Province|en|Musashi Province|qid=Q907398|lt=Musashi Province|1=Musashi Province}}. * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 12nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1569|en|1569|qid=Q6653|lt=1569|1=1569}} {{ill|April 24|en|April 24|qid=Q2529|lt=April 24|1=April 24}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} granted Kyoto residence to missionary {{ill|Luís Fróis|en|Luís Fróis|qid=Q553687|lt=Luis Fróis|1=Luís Fróis}}. * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|qid=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1617|en|1617|qid=Q6798|lt=1617|1=1617}} {{ill|May 12|en|May 12|qid=Q2559|lt=May 12|1=May 12}}) – The remains of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}}, moved from Suruga and {{ill|Kunōzan|ja|久能山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunōzan|1=Q27500689|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q27500689}}, were reinterred at {{ill|Nikkō Tōshō-gū|en|Nikkō Tōshō-gū|qid=Q696641|lt=Nikkō Tōshō-gū|1=Nikkō Tōshō-gū}} and the Okuninbyō. == Births == * {{ill|The Buddha|en|The Buddha|qid=Q9441|lt=Shakyamuni Tathāgata|1=The Buddha}}, the founder of {{ill|Buddhism|en|Buddhism|qid=Q748|lt=Buddhism|1=Buddhism}} (various theories exist regarding his birth and death years) * {{ill|Kyūan|en|Kyūan|qid=Q1193860|lt=Kyūan|1=Kyūan}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1147|en|1147|qid=Q19629|lt=1147|1=1147}} {{ill|May 9|en|May 9|qid=Q2556|lt=May 9|1=May 9}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|qid=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo|1=Minamoto no Yoritomo}}, a {{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} (died {{ill|1199|en|1199|qid=Q19752|lt=1199|1=1199}}). * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|qid=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenmei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1781|en|1781|qid=Q7719|lt=1781|1=1781}} {{ill|May 1|en|May 1|qid=Q2544|lt=May 1|1=May 1}}) – {{ill|Tachibana Moribe|ja|橘守部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Moribe|1=Tachibana Moribe|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6536628}}, a {{ill|Kokugakuist|1=Kokugaku|2=ja|3=国学者|ja|国学者|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakuist|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakusha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 国学|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q855159}} (died {{ill|1849|en|1849|qid=Q7650|lt=1849|1=1849}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1824|en|1824|qid=Q6994|lt=1824|1=1824}} {{ill|May 6|en|May 6|qid=Q2552|lt=May 6|1=May 6}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|en|Tokugawa Iesada|qid=Q336383|lt=Tokugawa Iesada|1=Tokugawa Iesada}}, a {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} 13th-generation {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} (died {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1827|en|1827|qid=Q7008|lt=1827|1=1827}} {{ill|May 28|en|May 28|qid=Q2588|lt=May 28|1=May 28}}) – {{ill|Sato Naonaka|ja|佐藤尚中|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sato Naonaka|1=Satō Takanaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11383932}} (山口舜海), a Dutch studies physician and founder of Juntendo Hospital (died {{ill|1882|en|1882|qid=Q7812|lt=1882|1=1882}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1833|en|1833|qid=Q7587|lt=1833|1=1833}} {{ill|May 26|en|May 26|qid=Q2586|lt=May 26|1=May 26}}) – {{ill|Kishida Ginka|ja|岸田吟香|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishida Ginka|1=Kishida Ginkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11475966}}, the father of journalist {{ill|Ryūsei Kishida|en|Ryūsei Kishida|qid=Q3021493|lt=Kishida Ryūsei|1=Ryūsei Kishida}} (died {{ill|1905|en|1905|qid=Q2047|lt=1905|1=1905}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1841|en|1841|qid=Q7622|lt=1841|1=1841}} {{ill|May 28|en|May 28|qid=Q2588|lt=May 28|1=May 28}}) – {{ill|Sakaigawa Namiemon|en|Sakaigawa Namiemon|qid=Q3874521|lt=Sakaigawa Rōemon|1=Sakaigawa Namiemon}}, the 14th-generation {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokozuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yokozuna|qid=Q1067277}} (died {{ill|1887|en|1887|qid=Q7826|lt=1887|1=1887}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kannō|en|Kannō|qid=Q1145053|lt=Kannō|1=Kannō}} 2nd year / {{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|qid=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei|1=Zhengping}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1351|en|1351|qid=Q6104|lt=1351|1=1351}} {{ill|May 4|en|May 4|qid=Q2549|lt=May 4|1=May 4}}) – {{ill|Akamatsu Norimasa|ja|赤松範資|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akamatsu Norimasa|1=Akamatsu Norisuke|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635723}}, a {{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} (born {{ill|1280|en|1280|qid=Q5536|lt=1280|1=1280}}). * {{ill|Keitai|ja|景泰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keitai|1=Jingtai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q840348}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1450|en|1450|qid=Q6452|lt=1450|1=1450}} {{ill|May 18|en|May 18|qid=Q2576|lt=May 18|1=May 18}}) – {{ill|世宗|en|世宗|qid=Q124369479|lt=Sejong|1=世宗}}, King of the {{ill|Joseon|en|Joseon|qid=Q28179|lt=Joseon Dynasty|1=Joseon}} (born {{ill|1397|en|1397|qid=Q6410|lt=1397|1=1397}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 12nd year (leap April) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1607|en|1607|qid=Q6756|lt=1607|1=1607}} {{ill|June 2|en|June 2|qid=Q2624|lt=June 2|1=June 2}}) – {{ill|Yūki Hideyasu|en|Yūki Hideyasu|qid=Q1130929|lt=Yūki Hideyasu|1=Yūki Hideyasu}} <ref>{{Kotobank|結城秀康|qq=}}</ref>, the second son of the founder, the first lord of {{ill|Fukui Domain|en|Fukui Domain|qid=Q903537|lt=Fukui Domain|1=Fukui Domain}}, and {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} (born {{ill|1574|en|1574|qid=Q6680|lt=1574|1=1574}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1862|en|1862|qid=Q7698|lt=1862|1=1862}} {{ill|May 6|en|May 6|qid=Q2552|lt=May 6|1=May 6}}) – {{ill|Yoshida Tōyō|en|Yoshida Tōyō|qid=Q4715741|lt=Yoshida Tōyō|1=Yoshida Tōyō}}, a samurai of the {{ill|Tosa Domain|en|Tosa Domain|qid=Q1189704|lt=Tosa Domain|1=Tosa Domain}} (born {{ill|1816|en|1816|qid=Q6953|lt=1816|1=1816}}). == Commemorations == * {{ill|Buddha's Birthday|en|Buddha's Birthday|qid=Q5348941|lt=Kambutsukai|1=Buddha's Birthday}} (Hanamatsuri)
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|7|4|9|3|8|5|4|0408|qq=}} * {{ill|Uzuki 8th day|ja|卯月八日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uzuki 8th day|1=Events on 8th day of the 4th month in the Chinese calendar|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17222680}} (a folk custom observed on Lunisolar April 8)
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月初八]] {{translated page|ja|4月8日 (旧暦)|version=83857481|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[cdo:4 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:April 8 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 4월 8일]] [[ja:4月8日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:四月初八]]
[[ar:April 8 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月初八]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月初八]]
